message:
fix(net,transport,lab): websocket close encoding, load balancer select_n, and format string cleanup

Three targeted correctness fixes:

1. websocket/close.rs: Handle the case where CloseReason has text but no
   explicit code. Previously this silently dropped the text (encoded as
   empty bytes). Now it defaults to code 1000 (Normal Closure) and
   includes the text payload, matching RFC 6455 semantics.

2. transport/router.rs: Fix select_n() returning fewer endpoints than
   available when n >= available.len(). The early-return path skipped the
   strategy-specific selection, but strategies like LeastConnections need
   to run their ranking logic even when selecting all candidates. Changed
   to compute count = n.min(available.len()) upfront and always go through
   the strategy path.

3. lab/oracle/mod.rs: Remove trailing commas inside format!() string
   arguments that were harmless but inconsistent with project style.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
